printify_products.title: Boyfriend Tee — Lake Erie Girls Stay Anchored Bow & Anchor Graphic Women's Tee
printify_products.printify_description:
A lightweight, slim-fit tee designed to feel like borrowed comfort with a quietly confident edge. The soft, combed fabric drapes longer over the body for a flattering silhouette while the neat ribbed collar and shoulder tape keep the shape looking fresh after every wear. A small, handwritten chest script and a vintage-inspired anchor motif on the back give this shirt a subtle seaside attitude — casual enough for everyday wear, special enough to wear when you want to show a bit of personality. It sits close to the body, so choose the next size up if you prefer a roomier fit.

Product features
- Soft combed, ring-spun cotton for smooth printability
- Lightweight fabric (4.3 oz/yd²) with a slim, longer cut
- Ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
- Side seams and structured construction for lasting fit
- Tear-away label; runs smaller than usual (consider sizing up)

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Do not bleach
- Tumble dry: medium
- Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
- Do not dryclean

printify_products.title: Great Lakes Hoodie — "Always Fresh (Sometimes Frozen)" Navy Pullover
printify_products.printify_description:
This navy hooded sweatshirt carries a calm, familiar confidence — the kind you reach for when the air turns crisp and you want something that holds warmth without weighing you down. The front bears a subtle circular emblem; the back shows a distressed Great Lakes silhouette with the words “Always Fresh (Sometimes Frozen),” a quiet nod to lake-lovers who know weather and water by feeling. Midweight fleece and a roomy kangaroo pocket make it a cozy layer for early morning coffee runs, shoreline walks, or late-night bonfires. The hood’s adjustable drawstrings and a soft, tear-away label keep comfort simple and practical. Built to last with double-needle stitching and ribbed cuffs that keep their shape, this sweatshirt becomes one you reach for again and again.

Product features
- 80% cotton / 20% polyester midweight fleece with 100% cotton face for a warm, soft feel
- Adjustable jersey-lined hood with self-colored drawstrings and metal eyelets
- Ribbed knit cuffs and waistband for long-lasting shape retention
- Durable double-needle stitching and twill necktape for extra stability and comfort
- Kangaroo pocket, tear-away label, regular fit — age 18+; meets flammability standards

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Do not bleach
- Tumble dry: low heat
- Do not iron
- Do not dryclean

printify_products.title: Lake Erie Women's Anchor & Bow Tee  — "The Boyfriend Tee" Nautical Graphic Shirt
printify_products.printify_description:
Soft, lightweight tee shaped like a borrowed favorite — but made for her. This slim, slightly longer shirt drapes close to the body without feeling heavy, giving a lived-in look that layers easily under a cardigan or stands alone with high-waist jeans. The back shows a delicate anchor tied with a bow and hand-lettered “Lake Erie,” evoking quiet mornings by the water, salty breeze, and slow afternoons on the dock. It’s for women who keep a map of shorelines in their head and reach for something simple and familiar when they want to feel rooted and calm.

Product features
- 100% combed, ring-spun cotton for solid colors (heathers include 10% polyester)
- Lightweight fabric — 4.3 oz/yd² (146 g/m²) for breathable comfort
- Slim fit with longer body length for a modern, tucked-or-untucked look
- Construction details: side seams, shoulder tape, and ribbed knit collar for shape retention
- Tear-away label; garment runs smaller than usual (consider sizing up)

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Do not bleach
- Tumble dry: medium
- Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
- Do not dryclean

printify_products.title: Women's Floral Skull Tee — 'Lake Erie Loot Crew' Festival Shirt
printify_products.printify_description:
A slim-fit women’s tee that blends soft, lightweight comfort with bold, artsy attitude. The white shirt features a small pink emblem over the heart and a vivid back print: a watercolor-style skull crowned with pastel flowers and curved event text. It wears like a casual statement piece — delicate in detail but confident in tone — made for someone who collects offbeat looks and pairs feminine motifs with a touch of edge. Soft, breathable cotton and a longer, fitted silhouette let it layer easily under a jacket or stand alone at outdoor gatherings. The design reads like a memory from a lively summer festival: sun, music, and a little beautiful mischief.

Product features
- 100% airlume combed and ringspun cotton for solid colors; heather blends vary by color
- Lightweight fabric (4.2 oz/yd²) with a slim, longer body fit
- Supportive construction: side seams, shoulder tape, and ribbed knit collar for shape retention
- Tear-away label and meets flammability requirements; adult sizing
- Runs smaller than usual — consider sizing up for a roomier fit

Care instructions
- Machine wash: warm (max 40C or 105F)
- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
- Tumble dry: low heat
- Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
- Do not dryclean

printify_products.title: Pirate Fest T-Shirt — "Drop Anchor, Raise Hell" Skull & Ship Graphic
printify_products.printify_description:
This heavyweight, garment-dyed tee carries the grit and color of a seaside revel. A bold pirate skull, anchor and roiling waves print sits center chest, finished with distressed shading that blends into the soft-dyed fabric. The relaxed cut and substantial 6.1 oz cotton give it a lived-in feel from the first wear—like you’ve already been to the festival and back. Wear it to rowdy outdoor gatherings, bonfire nights, or while planning the next salty adventure. The sewn-in label and durable double-needle stitching mean it’ll stand up to repeat wears and washes, while the tubular knit and pre-shrunk cotton keep the silhouette clean and comfortable. Available in an array of muted, vintage-inspired colors, this shirt ages gracefully with every wash and tells a story on its own.

Product features
- 100% ring-spun US cotton — heavyweight (6.1 oz) for durability and soft hand
- Garment-dyed after construction for vintage color and supple texture
- Double-needle stitching on all seams for long-lasting wear
- Tubular knit (no side seams) with sewn-in label; pre-shrunk to maintain shape
- Sizes S–4XL and 58 color options; made in Honduras

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Do not bleach
- Tumble dry: low heat
- Iron, steam or dry: low heat
- Do not dryclean

printify_products.title: Skull Floral Tank — "Lake Erie Loot Crew" Women's Spaghetti Strap Tank
printify_products.printify_description:
Light, flirty, and a little bit fierce — this fitted spaghetti-strap tank brings floral softness to an edgy skull motif. The mid-length cut lets it sit easily with high-waist jeans or layered under an open button-down. Thick spaghetti straps give supportive comfort while the smooth Airlume combed ring‑spun cotton blend keeps the print crisp and colors vivid. Ethically produced and printed with DTF, it’s made for someone who mixes delicate details with bold attitude and wants clothing that holds up to everyday wear and movement.

Product features
- 52% Airlume combed ring‑spun cotton, 48% polyester for a soft, smooth hand
- Thick spaghetti straps for added comfort and support
- Mid-length fitted cut for easy layering or standalone wear
- DTF printed design for sharp, long-lasting color
- Produced in WRAP and FLA-partnered facilities (socially conscious manufacturing)

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F), gentle cycle
- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
- Tumble dry: low heat
- Iron, steam or dry: low heat
- Do not dryclean

printify_products.title: Walleye Angler Graphic Tee — "Walleye Capital of the World" Fishing Shirt
printify_products.printify_description:
This cotton crew tee carries a vintage-inspired bass illustration that feels like a sunlit morning on the lake. Light, breathable fabric drapes easily over layers and moves with you whether you’re casting lines at dawn or swapping stories by the campfire. The artwork sits centered on the chest with crisp DTF sleeve detailing — worn-in look without the scratch. It’s designed to hold its shape: reinforced shoulder tape, ribbed collar, and side seams keep the silhouette neat after many wears. Comfortable, simple, and made for people who read water, not weather.

Product features
- Lightweight 4.3 oz cotton fabric — all-season wear
- Ribbed knit collar with seam for lasting shape
- Shoulder tape and side seams for structural stability
- Direct-to-Film (DTF) sleeve print for vibrant, durable graphics
- Heather blends contain 90% cotton / 10% polyester where applicable

Care instructions
- Do not dryclean
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Do not bleach
- Tumble dry: low heat
- Iron, steam or dry: low heat

printify_products.title: Mug – "WTF Where's The Fish" Lake Erie Walleye Capital Black Coffee Mug 15oz
printify_products.printify_description:
This 15oz black ceramic mug carries a warm, lakeside personality—an illustrated walleye with text calling out Lake Erie as the "Walleye Capital of the World." The glossy black finish makes the artwork pop and keeps mornings feeling grounded and calm. It’s sturdy enough for everyday use: safe in the microwave and dishwasher, and handmade to meet safety standards (lead- and BPA-free). The generous 15oz capacity holds a full cup of coffee, tea, or a long black while you plan the next fishing trip or swap stories at the dock. The comfortable C-shaped handle gives a secure grip for early mornings and late-night brews alike.

Product features
- Glossy black ceramic finish that enhances printed artwork
- 15 oz capacity—larger cup for coffee, tea, or longer drinks
- Microwave- and dishwasher-safe for easy daily use
- C-shaped easy-grip handle for comfortable holding
- Lead- and BPA-free; meets FDA/CSC ceramicware safety standards

Care instructions
- Clean in dishwasher or wash by hand with warm water and dish soap

printify_products.title: OU Mens Rugby Green Hoodie
printify_products.printify_description:
This medium-weight hoodie brings quiet confidence to everyday wear. The smooth 80/20 cotton-poly blend feels soft against the skin while standing up to repeated wear and prints, so the back crest remains sharp and slightly vintage in character. A roomy kangaroo pocket and adjustable drawstring hood make it easy to slip on for chilly evenings, late practices, or casual campus days. The ribbed cuffs and waistband hold their shape, keeping warmth where you want it without bulk. Wear it with worn denim or layered under a jacket — it settles into your routine and keeps the focus on the subtle emblem at the back: heritage-inspired, athletic, and quietly storied.

Product features
- 80% cotton / 20% polyester medium-weight fabric (8.5 oz) — soft, durable, great for printing
- Adjustable drawstring hood with matching woven cord
- Spacious kangaroo pouch pocket for hands and essentials
- Ribbed-knit cuffs and waistband retain shape and provide stretch
- Tear-away label and regular fit for comfortable, low-profile wear

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Do not bleach
- Do not tumble dry
- Iron, steam or dry: low heat
- Do not dryclean

printify_products.title: Unisex Heavy Blend™ Hooded Sweatshirt
printify_products.printify_description:
The Gildan Heavy Blend™ hoodie, made from a soft cotton-poly blend, provides warmth and durability. Its unisex fit offers everyday versatility, with ribbed cuffs and hem to keep the shape intact. A large front pocket adds convenience, while the double-lined hood with matching drawcord gives it a clean, cohesive look. Trusted for custom printing and casual wear, the Gildan 18500 is a reliable choice that balances comfort and longevity.

Disclaimer:
- Due to the fabric properties, the White color variant may appear off-white rather than bright white.


.: The Gildan 18500 is made from a medium-heavy fabric (8.0 oz/yd² (271 g/m²)) made of 50% cotton and 50% polyester. This blend delivers cozy warmth and a soft feel that makes it perfect for chilly days.
.: The classic fit along with the pouch pocket and the tear-away label make for a highly comfortable, scratch-free wearing experience.
.: The color-matched drawcord and the double-lined hood add a stylish flair and durability that tie everything together.
.: Made using 100% ethically grown US cotton. Gildan is also a proud member of the US Cotton Trust Protocol ensuring ethical and sustainable means of production. The blank tee's dyes are OEKO-TEX-certified dyes with low environmental impact.
.: Fabric blends: Heather Sport colors - 60% polyester, 40% cotton
.: Embroidery decoration method available on either left chest, center chest, or large center chest, as well as right + left wrists

printify_products.title: OU Mens Rugby Piqué Polo
printify_products.printify_description:
Made with 100% ring-spun, pre-shrunk piqué cotton that is sustainably grown and harvested in the US. Each polo shirt comes with welt-knit collars to resist unwanted curling while the classic three-button placket features pearlized buttons held together by durable cross-stitching and offers a timeless touch that is reinforced at the bottom with a box-stitch.

.: 100% ring-spun cotton (fiber content varies for different colors)
.: Medium fabric (6.5 oz/yd² (220 g/m²))
.: Classic fit
.: Tear-away label

printify_products.title: OU Mens Rugby Unisex Joggers
printify_products.printify_description:
These embroidered joggers are the perfect combination of comfort and style, whether you're hitting the gym or lounging at home. Made from a 60% cotton, 40% polyester blend with pre-shrunk fleece, they provide a soft, cozy feel and a fabric weight of 7.2 oz/yd² (244 g/m²) for durability. The tapered fit offers a sleek, modern silhouette, with a lower rise on the front and a longer rise on the backside for extra comfort. 

Meanwhile, the custom embroidery design adds a unique feel and look to your everyday look. Blank product sourced from El Salvador or Honduras.

printify_products.title: OU Mens Rugby Quarter Zip Sweatshirt
printify_products.printify_description:
This quarter-zip sweatshirt brings a quiet, vintage varsity energy to everyday wear. The muted slate tone and crest-style graphic—featuring a sleek hound, crossed oars, and subtle rose motifs—feel like a worn badge of belonging from long afternoons at the club or the river. The heavy, structured fabric and relaxed silhouette wrap you in warmth without feeling bulky. Wear it after practice, on slow weekend drives, or at low-key reunions; it settles in like an old companion, carrying the texture of stories and small traditions.

Soft against the skin, the self-lined collar and half-zip let you move between layered looks. The rolled-shoulder cut and side-seamed body keep the shape steady while letting you reach, row, or reach for a late-night coffee. The design reads handcrafted and considered—not loud, but distinct—so it sits naturally in wardrobes that favor heritage details and lived-in style.

Product features
- 80% ring-spun cotton / 20% polyester heavy knit (9.5 oz) for durable warmth and a soft hand-feel
- Relaxed fit with rolled-forward shoulders and side seams for mobility and structure
- 1x1 rib cuffs and waistband with spandex for stretch-and-recovery at openings
- Self-fabric lined collar with quarter-zip for layered styling and easy temperature control
- Dyed with OEKO-TEX certified low-impact dyes for cleaner, eco-conscious coloring

Care instructions
- Machine wash: warm (max 40C or 105F), gentle cycle
- Bleach as needed
- Tumble dry: medium heat
- Do not iron
- Do not dryclean

printify_products.title: OU Mens Rugby Fleece Sweatshorts
printify_products.printify_description:
These sponge fleece shorts fold relaxed comfort into a wearable daily ritual. The mid-thigh cut and athletic silhouette move easily from weekend errands to slow mornings at home. The soft, medium-heavy fleece cradles the body without feeling bulky. Deep, lined side pockets hold your phone and keys, while the drawstring comfort waistband lets you dial in a relaxed fit. A subtle, low-placed crest adds a quiet, personal note — not loud, just confident. Wear them with a tee and sneakers for an easy outdoor stroll, or pair with a cozy sweatshirt when you linger over coffee. They feel lived-in from the first wear and keep getting better.

Product features
- 52% ring-spun cotton / 48% polyester (solid) — soft, durable fleece
- Medium-heavy fabric (8.1 oz / yd²) for cozy structure
- Two lined side-entry pockets for secure storage
- Comfort waistband with drawstring for adjustable fit
- Athletic silhouette with mid-thigh length for easy movement

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Do not dryclean
- Iron, steam or dry: low heat
- Tumble dry: low heat
- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed

printify_products.title: OU Mens Rugby Microfiber Blanket
printify_products.printify_description:
Everyone has their favorite blankie, if not—this will be it. It comes in multiple sizes so anyone can enjoy it—toddlers, grown-ups, even your four-legged best friends. The 2" stitch makes sure the blanket's borders stay intact. It's made from a super-soft fleece that'll be decorated with your eye-catching designs in picture-perfect quality.

.: Material: 100% polyester

printify_products.printify_description:
Made with 100% brushed polyester, these customized pajama pants add luxurious comfort and style to everyday life. The soft and stretchy fabric has the perfect balance of coziness and agility for maximum relaxation when lounging at home.

printify_products.title: OU Mens Rugby Sweatshirt
printify_products.printify_description:
This relaxed-fit sweatshirt carries a vintage collegiate vibe — worn-in, quietly confident, and built to last. The front features a small embroidered crest over the heart; the back shows a distressed, shield-style Ohio University design with classic typography and emblem details. The medium-heavy fabric drapes comfortably and keeps its shape thanks to ribbed collar, cuffs, and hem. It’s a cozy layer for campus walks, coffee runs, or nights at the student union — familiar, grounded, and lived-in without trying too hard.

Product features
- 80% ring-spun cotton / 20% polyester medium-heavy fabric (9.5 oz) for soft durability
- 1x1 ribbed collar, cuffs, and bottom hem for stretch and shape retention
- Twill neck tape and half-moon back patch for stabilized, comfortable wear

printify_products.title: OU Rugby Tee
printify_products.printify_description:
A soft, garment-dyed tee that feels lived-in from the first wear. This relaxed-fit T-shirt carries a subtle, vintage-inspired crest on the chest and a larger matching emblem across the back — muted greens, deep reds, and a worn-in texture create a collegiate, road-trip vibe. It sits comfortably on the shoulders and hangs loose through the torso, making it a go-to layer for slow mornings, late-night drives, and backyard gatherings. Wear it with faded denim, a flannel tied at the waist, or under an open jacket. The heavyweight cotton and garment-dye process give the shirt a weighty, durable feel while keeping the fabric pleasantly soft against the skin. It ages beautifully; the crest gains character as the tee softens and lightens with every wash, folding seamlessly into a relaxed, nostalgic wardrobe.

Product features
- 100% ring-spun US cotton for long-lasting comfort
- Garment-dyed for a soft, lived-in color and texture
- Heavyweight 6.1 oz fabric with relaxed fit and pre-shrunk construction
- Tubular knit (no side seams) and double-needle stitched seams for durability
- Available S–4XL with sewn-in label and 58 color options

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Do not bleach
- Tumble dry: low heat
- Iron, steam or dry: low heat
- Do not dryclean
